features: This wash-off gel effectively cleanses while being gentle on the skin, making it suitable for sensitive skin types.
24-hour protection: Enjoy the assurance of 24 hr protection against sweat and odor, perfect for active lifestyles, busy days and after sport.
Non-drying formula: The gentle soap-free formula helps to prevent skin dryness, leaving the skin comfortable and moisturized.
Dermotologist-tested: Formulated by dermatologists, this gel is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive ones, and can be used on the body and inimate areas.
How to use it: Apply a small amount to wet skin, gently massage, and rinse thoroughly for all-day protection and freshness.
description: From the brand Previous page Highly effective medical-grade products created by pharmacists, prescribed by doctors. SVR products contain natural origin actives that support the skin barrier + microbiome. Designed to be gentle on sensitive skin. EXPLORE OUR BRAND >>> FRENCH PHARMACY The original French Pharmacy brand since 1962. Dermatological brand sold in over 60 countries. ALL SKIN-TYPES Skin-safe formulas for all skin types. Newborn, baby, child, sensitive + reactive. MEDICAL-GRADE FORMULATIONS Well-tolerated medical-grade formulations, prescribed by doctors globally. CLEAN FORMULAS Highly efficacious concentrated actives - maximum of natural ingredients, no nasties. ENVIRONMENTALLY AWARE Formulas with minimal environmental impact. Committed to reduced packaging + plastic. PERSONALISED MIX + MATCH Pick your ideal hydration intensity, treatment, SPF by skin type, preferred cleansing method.
